landing.heroTitle: One title → ready-to-use animation prompt package
landing.heroSubtitle: Consistent characters across scenes. Multi-provider LLM. Export JSON / Markdown.
landing.feature1Desc: Enter title + duration + style. The system generates the full package.
landing.feature2Desc: Structured character master referenced across scenes — identity stays, scenes vary.
landing.feature3Desc: Structured JSON + Markdown. Copy to your favorite image/video gen tool.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.empty: No projects yet. Create your first one.
projects.referencesDesc: Upload character/background images. The system will reference file names in prompts.

settings.title: Settings
settings.providersDesc: Add provider + API key. API key is AES-256-GCM encrypted.
settings.providersEmpty: No provider yet. Add one to start generating.
